function site_o_mattic_import_asset($asset) {
    $bytes = base64_decode($asset['base64'], true);
    if (false === $bytes) {
        throw new Exception('Could not decode asset: ' . $asset['filename']);
    }

    $upload = wp_upload_bits($asset['filename'], null, $bytes);
    if (!empty($upload['error'])) {
        throw new Exception($upload['error']);
    }

    $attachment_id = wp_insert_attachment([
        'post_mime_type' => $asset['mimeType'],
        'post_title' => $asset['title'],
        'post_content' => '',
        'post_excerpt' => $asset['alt'],
        'post_status' => 'inherit',
    ], $upload['file']);

    if (is_wp_error($attachment_id)) {
        throw new Exception($attachment_id->get_error_message());
    }

    update_post_meta($attachment_id, '_wp_attachment_image_alt', $asset['alt']);
    $metadata = wp_generate_attachment_metadata($attachment_id, $upload['file']);
    if (!is_wp_error($metadata) && !empty($metadata)) {
        wp_update_attachment_metadata($attachment_id, $metadata);
    }

    return $attachment_id;
}

$custom_css = ':root{
  --wp--preset--color--grass: #8b5f4d;
  --wp--preset--color--deep-green: #251c1a;
  --wp--preset--color--leaf: #d08f78;
  --wp--preset--color--sun: #f2c56b;
  --wp--preset--color--cream: #fbf3ea;
  --wp--preset--color--mist: #eadbd2;
  --wp--preset--color--soil: #66534d;
  --wp--preset--color--white: #ffffff;
  --wp--preset--spacing--20: 0.5rem;
  --wp--preset--spacing--30: 0.75rem;
  --wp--preset--spacing--40: 1rem;
  --wp--preset--spacing--50: 1.5rem;
  --wp--preset--spacing--60: 2.25rem;
  --wp--preset--spacing--70: 3.5rem;
  --wp--preset--spacing--80: 5rem;
  --wp--preset--font-size--small: 0.95rem;
  --wp--preset--font-size--body: 1.09rem;
  --wp--preset--font-size--lead: 1.35rem;
  --wp--preset--font-size--card-title: 1.7rem;
  --wp--preset--font-size--section-title: 3.2rem;
  --wp--preset--font-size--hero: 4.75rem;
  --wp--preset--font-family--body: Optima, Candara, "Segoe UI", Arial, sans-serif;
  --wp--preset--font-family--display: Charter, "Bitstream Charter", "Sitka Text", Cambria, Georgia, serif;
  --wp--preset--font-family--accent: "Avenir Next", Avenir, "Segoe UI", "Helvetica Neue", Arial, sans-serif;
  --wp--custom--som--measure--tight: 52ch;
  --wp--custom--som--measure--copy: 66ch;
  --wp--custom--som--type--heading-weight: 620;
  --wp--custom--som--type--action-weight: 700;
  --wp--custom--som--type--nav-weight: 680;
  --wp--custom--som--type--label-weight: 680;
  --wp--custom--som--type--heading-line-height: 1.05;
  --wp--custom--som--type--body-line-height: 1.6;
  --wp--custom--som--color--ink: #251c1a;
  --wp--custom--som--color--paper: #fbf3ea;
  --wp--custom--som--color--field: #eadbd2;
  --wp--custom--som--color--line: #d08f78;
  --wp--custom--som--color--primary: #8b5f4d;
  --wp--custom--som--color--action: #f2c56b;
  --wp--custom--som--color--proof: #d08f78;
  --wp--custom--som--color--muted: #66534d;
  --wp--custom--som--color--warning: #f2c56b;
  --wp--custom--som--color--shadow-tint: #251c1a;
  --wp--custom--som--radius--chip: 999px;
  --wp--custom--som--radius--card: 8px;
  --wp--custom--som--radius--panel: 8px;
  --wp--custom--som--radius--image: 8px;
  --wp--custom--som--shadow--card: 0 16px 50px rgba(5,45,63,.08);
  --wp--custom--som--shadow--lift: 0 28px 80px rgba(5,45,63,.18);
  --wp--custom--som--shadow--button: 0 10px 24px rgba(5,45,63,.14);
}
body{
  background:#fbf3ea;
  font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--body);
  line-height:var(--wp--custom--som--type--body-line-height);
}
.wp-site-blocks{
  padding-top:0;
  padding-bottom:0;
}
.wp-site-blocks :where(h1,h2,h3){
  font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--display)!important;
  font-weight:var(--wp--custom--som--type--heading-weight)!important;
  line-height:var(--wp--custom--som--type--heading-line-height)!important;
}
.wp-site-blocks h1.wp-block-heading{
  font-size:clamp(2.25rem, 5vw, var(--wp--preset--font-size--hero))!important;
}
.wp-site-blocks h2.wp-block-heading{
  font-size:clamp(1.95rem, 4vw, var(--wp--preset--font-size--section-title))!important;
}
.wp-site-blocks h3.wp-block-heading{
  font-size:clamp(1.25rem, 2vw, var(--wp--preset--font-size--card-title))!important;
}
.wp-block-navigation a,
.wp-block-button__link{
  font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--accent)!important;
}
.wp-block-navigation a{
  font-weight:var(--wp--custom--som--type--nav-weight)!important;
}
.wp-block-button__link{
  font-weight:var(--wp--custom--som--type--action-weight)!important;
}
.wp-site-blocks :where(p,li,summary,td,th){
  font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--body);
}
.wp-site-blocks :where(.som-chip,.som-method-pill,.som-ticket-line,.som-rail-note,.som-date-cell,.som-ticket-line span,.som-ticket-line strong){
  font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--accent)!important;
  font-weight:var(--wp--custom--som--type--label-weight);
}
.has-grass-color{color:#8b5f4d!important}.has-grass-background-color{background-color:#8b5f4d!important}
.has-deep-green-color{color:#251c1a!important}.has-deep-green-background-color{background-color:#251c1a!important}
.has-leaf-color{color:#d08f78!important}.has-leaf-background-color{background-color:#d08f78!important}
.has-sun-color{color:#f2c56b!important}.has-sun-background-color{background-color:#f2c56b!important}
.has-cream-color{color:#fbf3ea!important}.has-cream-background-color{background-color:#fbf3ea!important}
.has-mist-color{color:#eadbd2!important}.has-mist-background-color{background-color:#eadbd2!important}
.has-soil-color{color:#66534d!important}.has-soil-background-color{background-color:#66534d!important}
.has-white-color{color:#ffffff!important}.has-white-background-color{background-color:#ffffff!important}
.has-card-box-shadow{box-shadow:0 16px 50px rgba(5,45,63,.08)!important}
.has-lift-box-shadow{box-shadow:0 28px 80px rgba(5,45,63,.18)!important}
.has-button-box-shadow{box-shadow:0 10px 24px rgba(5,45,63,.14)!important}
html{
  scroll-behavior:smooth;
}
body{
  text-rendering:optimizeLegibility;
}
.wp-site-blocks :where(h1,h2,h3){
  text-wrap:balance;
}
.wp-site-blocks :where(p,li){
  text-wrap:pretty;
}
.wp-site-blocks p{
  max-inline-size:var(--wp--custom--som--measure--copy);
}
.wp-site-blocks p.has-text-align-center{
  margin-left:auto;
  margin-right:auto;
}
.wp-site-blocks :where(.som-chip,.som-method-pill,.som-ticket-line,.som-rail-note,.som-date-cell,.som-route-card-number,.som-haul-number,.som-timeline-number,.som-water-step-number,.som-zone-step-number,.som-craft-step-number,.som-row-number,.som-detail-step-number,.som-menu-step-number,.som-warning-number,.som-urgent-step-number){
  max-inline-size:none;
  font-weight:var(--wp--custom--som--type--label-weight);
}
.wp-block-button__link{
  box-shadow:var(--wp--custom--som--shadow--button);
  transition:box-shadow .18s ease, background-color .18s ease, color .18s ease;
}
.wp-block-button__link:hover{
  box-shadow:var(--wp--custom--som--shadow--card);
}
.wp-block-button__link:focus-visible,
.wp-block-navigation a:focus-visible{
  outline:3px solid #f2c56b;
  outline-offset:4px;
}
.wp-block-navigation a:hover{
  text-decoration:underline;
  text-decoration-thickness:2px;
  text-underline-offset:.25em;
}

.som-card,
.som-process-card,
.som-proof-card,
.som-quote-card,
.som-evidence-card{
  box-shadow:var(--wp--custom--som--shadow--card);
  border-radius:var(--wp--custom--som--radius--card);
}
.som-card,
.som-process-card,
.som-proof-card{
  min-height:100%;
}
.wp-site-blocks :where(.som-proof-card,.som-route-proof-card){
  display:grid;
  grid-template-rows:minmax(2.1em, auto) auto;
  align-content:space-between;
  row-gap:clamp(14px, 2vw, 24px);
}
.wp-site-blocks :where(.som-proof-card,.som-route-proof-card) > :first-child{
  align-self:start;
  min-block-size:1.02em;
  margin-top:0!important;
  margin-bottom:0!important;
  font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--display)!important;
  line-height:1!important;
  text-wrap:balance;
}
.wp-site-blocks :where(.som-proof-card,.som-route-proof-card) > :last-child{
  align-self:end;
  max-inline-size:28ch;
  margin-top:0!important;
  margin-bottom:0!important;
  font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--accent)!important;
  line-height:1.26!important;
}
.wp-site-blocks :where(.som-proof-card,.som-route-proof-card) > :only-child{
  align-self:start;
}
.som-quote-card{
  border-radius:var(--wp--custom--som--radius--panel);
  box-shadow:var(--wp--custom--som--shadow--lift);
}
.som-footer{
  font-size:var(--wp--preset--font-size--small);
}
.som-chip,
.som-method-pill{
  box-shadow:inset 0 0 0 1px color-mix(in srgb, #251c1a 12%, transparent);
}
.wp-block-image img{
  max-width:100%;
}
.wp-block-media-text .wp-block-media-text__media img,
.wp-block-gallery img{
  border-radius:var(--wp--custom--som--radius--image);
}
.wp-block-details{
  border:1px solid color-mix(in srgb, #251c1a 12%, transparent);
  border-radius:var(--wp--custom--som--radius--card);
  background:color-mix(in srgb, #ffffff 86%, #eadbd2);
}
.wp-block-details summary{
  cursor:pointer;
  font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--accent);
  font-weight:var(--wp--custom--som--type--action-weight);
}
.wp-block-details summary:focus-visible{
  outline:3px solid #f2c56b;
  outline-offset:4px;
}

.som-side-rail-quote-band,
.som-workshop-quote-band,
.som-detail-quote-band,
.som-service-quote-band{
  border-bottom:1px solid color-mix(in srgb, #251c1a 10%, transparent);
  border-radius:var(--wp--custom--som--radius--card);
  box-shadow:var(--wp--preset--shadow--card);
}
.som-side-rail-quote,
.som-workshop-quote,
.som-detail-quote,
.som-service-quote{
  margin:0;
  max-width:820px;
}
.wp-block-table table{
  border-collapse:collapse;
  width:100%;
}
.wp-block-table :where(th,td){
  border-bottom:1px solid color-mix(in srgb, #251c1a 14%, transparent);
  padding:.9rem 1rem;
  text-align:left;
  vertical-align:top;
}
.wp-block-table thead{
  background:color-mix(in srgb, #f2c56b 20%, #ffffff);
}

.wp-block-quote,
.wp-block-pullquote{
  border-color:#f2c56b;
  color:#251c1a;
}
@media (max-width:700px){
  .wp-block-button__link{
    box-sizing:border-box;
    max-width:100%;
  }

  .wp-block-columns{
    gap:var(--wp--preset--spacing--50);
  }
  .wp-site-blocks :where(h1,h2){
    hyphens:manual;
    overflow-wrap:break-word;
  }
}
.wp-block-cover .wp-block-cover__inner-container{
  position:relative;
  z-index:1;
}
.wp-block-site-logo img{
  height:auto;
  max-width:min(230px, 62vw);
}
.som-gallery-image img{
  width:100%;
  min-height:350px;
  aspect-ratio:16/5.2;
  object-fit:cover;
  border-radius:8px;
  box-shadow:0 28px 80px rgba(5,45,63,.18);
}
.som-gallery-copy-row{
  position:relative;
  z-index:2;
  margin-top:-86px!important;
}
.som-gallery-copy,
.som-gallery-note,
.som-style-card,
.som-proof-gallery,
.som-gallery-quote,
.som-gallery-proof{
  box-shadow:var(--wp--custom--som--shadow--card);
}
.som-proof-gallery{
  margin-bottom:24px;
}
.som-proof-gallery img{
  width:100%;
  max-height:520px;
  object-fit:cover;
  border-radius:8px;
}
.som-proof-gallery figcaption{
  color:#66534d;
  font-family:var(--wp--preset--font-family--accent);
  font-weight:760;
}
.som-gallery-quote{
  margin-top:20px;
  padding:22px 26px;
  background:color-mix(in srgb, #eadbd2 62%, #ffffff);
}
.som-style-card{
